// GRID: Pixel art resolution. More = finer detail, fewer = blockier but more visible (try 16-32)
// ASPECT: Terminal cell width:height ratio. Adjust if parrot looks stretched. Typical: 0.5-0.6 for most fonts
// TRANSPARENCY: Alpha threshold 0-255. Pixels below this become transparent. Higher = cleaner edges
// SHARP: Resampling: 'nearest' for crisp pixel art, 'lanczos' for smooth gradients
// QUANTIZE: Max colors per frame. 0 = unlimited. Lower = fewer layers, bolder look (try 8-32)
// DARK_THRESHOLD: Remove near-black pixels (dark outlines). RGB sum below this = removed. 0 = keep all
// LIGHT_THRESHOLD: Remove near-white stray pixels. Pixels where min(R,G,B) > this are removed. 0 = keep all
// VERTICAL_OFFSET: Shift parrot up (+) or down (-) in the cell, in grid rows. 0 = auto bottom-align
// PADDING: Horizontal padding in grid columns (removed from each side). 0 = fill full width
// FONT: Base monospace font to merge parrot glyphs into. Change to match your terminal font
// FRAMES: Directory containing parrot frame PNGs (frame_00.png through frame_09.png)
// CODEPOINTS: First Unicode codepoint for parrot frames (Private Use Area). Don't change unless needed
